title: [Basalt Cliff, Face]
description: Halfway up the cliff face is a ledge wide enough to pause on safely.  It extends further east though the footing is treacherous.  The view from here is breathtaking, with Kharam Dzu appearing like a toy town below were it not for the tiny inhabitants moving about their daily routines.

wayto.29168: ;e cur_stance = XMLData.stance_text;empty_hands;fput('stance offensive') if cur_stance != 'offensive';move('climb cliff face');fill_hands;fput('stance ' + cur_stance) if cur_stance != 'offensive';$go2_restart = true
